name: Booking Holdings Inc.
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. is a global online travel company operating five primary brands: Booking.com, Priceline, Agoda, KAYAK, and OpenTable. It provides accommodation, flight, rental car, attraction, and restaurant reservation services. For fiscal year 2025, revenues were $26.9 billion, derived from merchant transactions, agency commissions, and advertising. Booking.com alone offers approximately 4.4 million properties across 220+ countries in 40+ languages.

products.name: Booking.com
products.description: World's leading online accommodation reservation platform offering hotels, homes, flights, and activities in 220+ countries.

products.name: Priceline
products.description: Discount travel reservation service primarily in North America offering accommodations, flights, rental cars, and vacation packages.

products.name: Agoda
products.description: Online accommodation and travel reservation service catering primarily to Asia-Pacific consumers, also offering flights and attractions.

products.name: KAYAK
products.description: Online meta-search service allowing consumers to compare travel itineraries and prices across hundreds of platforms in 60+ countries.

products.name: OpenTable
products.description: Online restaurant reservation and management service primarily in the United States.

products.name: Connected Trip
products.description: AI-powered integrated travel planning, booking, payment, and in-trip experience vision across Booking Holdings brands.

products.name: Smart Messenger
products.description: Gen AI-powered tool enabling partners to engage with guests more efficiently.

products.name: Auto-Reply
products.description: Gen AI-powered tool for partners to automate guest communications.

products.name: Genius Loyalty Program
products.description: Booking.com loyalty program expanded across verticals to provide personalized consumer experiences and incremental partner value.

partnerships.description: Booking Holdings partnered with leading generative AI organizations to advance AI capabilities across consumer and partner offerings.
